Block.Para: First Session, Thirty-sixth Parliament,

STATUTES OF CANADA 1999
CHAPTER 39
An Act respecting the Alliance of Manufacturers & Exporters Canada
ASSENTED TO
17th JUNE, 1999
BILL S-18

Available on the Parliament of Canada Web Site at the following address:
http://www.parl.gc.ca

This enactment changes the name of the Canadian Manufacturers芒聙聶 Association to the Alliance of Manufacturers & Exporters Canada. It also removes certain restrictions on the corporation芒聙聶s investment powers and ensures that its export trade powers relate, not only to goods, but also to services.
46-47-48 ELIZABETH II
芒聙聰芒聙聰芒聙聰芒聙聰芒聙聰芒聙聰
CHAPTER 39
An Act respecting the Alliance of Manufacturers & Exporters Canada
[Assented to 17th June, 1999]
WHEREAS Parliament incorporated the Canadian Manufacturers芒聙聶 Association by chapter 48 of the Statutes of Canada, 1902;
AND WHEREAS the corporation has by its petition prayed that its name be changed to 芒聙聹Alliance of Manufacturers & Exporters Canada芒聙聺;
AND WHEREAS the corporation has further prayed that its Act of incorporation be amended to extend its powers in order to facilitate its operations both within Canada and abroad;
AND WHEREAS the petitioner has prayed that it be enacted as hereinafter set forth, and it is expedient to grant the prayer of the petition;
NOW, THEREFORE, Her Majesty, by and with the advice and consent of the Senate and House of Commons of Canada, enacts as follows:
1. (1) The name of the Canadian Manufacturers芒聙聶 Association is changed to 芒聙聹Alliance of Manufacturers & Exporters Canada芒聙聺 (hereinafter referred to as the 芒聙聹Alliance芒聙聺).

(2) The change of name of the Alliance does not in any way impair, alter or affect its rights and liabilities, or any suit, proceeding or judgment either by or in favour of or against it, which may be prosecuted, continued, completed or enforced as if this Act had not been enacted.
2. (1) The long title of An Act to incorporate the Canadian Manufacturers芒聙聶 Association is replaced by the following:
An Act to incorporate the Alliance of Manufacturers & Exporters Canada.
(2) In section 1 of the Act, the words 芒聙聹Canadian Manufacturers芒聙聶 Association 芒聙聺 are replaced by 芒聙聹Alliance of Manufacturers & Exporters Canada芒聙聺.
(3) Wherever the word 芒聙聹Association芒聙聺 appears in the Act, it is replaced by 芒聙聹Alliance芒聙聺.
3. (1) Paragraph 6(c) of the Act is replaced by the following:
(c) engage in the work of developing and promoting the export trade of Canadian goods and services by such means as may be considered desirable;
(2) Paragraph 6(e) of the Act is repealed.
4. An Act respecting The Canadian Manufacturers芒聙聶 Association is repealed.
Published under authority of the Senate of Canada
脗聞
